name: Blueberry Pie in a Cast-Iron Pan
recipeIngredient: Milk or Egg Yolk for glazing the pastry
recipeInstructions:
1. Make the pastry dough and chill it.
2. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
3. Place the blueberries in a pan over medium heat with lemon juice and sugar. Cook until soft, tasting for sweetness. If there is too much juice, pour some off and save it to make a fruit sauce later.
4. Roll out the pastry dough into a circle that is an inch larger than a 9-inch cast-iron or enameled cast-iron skillet.
5. Place the circle of pastry on top of the pan and press down the edges with the blade of a butter knife.
6. Brush the pastry with milk or egg yolk.
7. Bake for 20 to 30 minutes, or until the pastry is golden brown.
